original_prompt: Fix Leads Pipeline Routing, Data Binding, and Strict CR Validation.
rephrased_goal: Fix 'View' button, fix data binding for merchant/CR, and upgrade duplicate check to parallel leads/merchants query.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix 'View' button event listener in Leads Pipeline
subtasks_required: Add or fix click event listener for .view-lead
tasks.testing_criteria: Clicking View button updates hash to #leads/:id

tasks.analogy_reference: jump on bridge to see if hold
tasks.testing_criteria: Event listener uses stopPropagation and correct hash

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix Merchant Name & CR Number Data Binding
subtasks_required: Update template literals to use correct lead.merchant_name or lead.cr_number
tasks.testing_criteria: Table cells show real data, not 'N/A' or empty

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify Data Binding in view.leads.js
Do-Pebble: Upgrade Duplicate CR Check in LeadsNewView
subtasks_required: Implement Promise.all for merchants and leads collections

App builds, logic and UI solid
